name: Katie and Cara need your help
description:
Katie has been your close friend since childhood. In college she met the love of her life Cara. They've had a beautiful romance together and have grown close as they have faced many challenges life has presented to an LGBT couple. You have been Katie's support and confident throughout your friendship and were even Katie's Man of Honor at their wedding. Recently Katie and Cara have purchased a house and are ready to take the next step: Having children. Cara absolutely does not want to adopt. They have looked into artificial insemination, and even though they are both fertile and good candidates for the procedure, the problem is the process is expensive. Today Katie and Cara come to you for help.

Will you be able to help them with their dream of starting a family?
creator: oktop
